zh.lifeSummary: 當Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme於1212年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格伯林時，他的父親Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11209歲，母親Mathilde von Groitzsch27歲。他於1243年與Beatrix von Böhmen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1267年10月9日在德國布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾享年55歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 奧培爾巴尼姆斯特勞斯格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme于1212年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格伯林时，他的父亲Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg11209岁，母亲Mathilde von Groitzsch27岁。他于1243年与Beatrix von Böhmen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1267年10月9日在德国布藍登波格布藍登波格 安 德 哈維爾享年55岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 奧培爾巴尼姆斯特勞斯格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme was born in 1212, in Berlin, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany, his father, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, was 11209 and his mother, Mathilde von Groitzsch, was 27. He married Beatrix von Böhmen in 1243. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 October 1267, in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 55, and was buried in Strausberg, Oberbarnim, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme est né en 1212, à Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, avait 11209 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Groitzsch, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix von Böhmen en 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 octobre 1267, à Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme 1212 in Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg 11209 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Groitzsch 27. Er hat 1243 Beatrix von Böhmen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Oktober 1267 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme è nato il nel 1212 nel Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, aveva 11209 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Groitzsch, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix von Böhmen nel 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 ottobre 1267, nel Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Frommeが1212年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグバーリンで生まれた時，父Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburgは11209歳，母Mathilde von Groitzschは27歳であった。1243年にBeatrix von Böhmenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1267年10月9日にドイツブランデンブルグブランデンブルグ アン ダー ヘイベルで55歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグクレイス オバーバーニムストラウスバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme(이)가 1212년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 벌린에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg(은)는 11209세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Groitzsch(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1243년 Beatrix von Böhmen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 10월 9일 독일 브랜덴버그 브랜덴버그 앤 데르 하벨에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 오버바른임 스트라스버그에 묻혔다.

pt.Strausberg, Oberbarnim, Brandenburg, Ger: Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme nasceu em 1212, em Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, tinha 11209 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Groitzsch, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix von Böhmen em 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1267, em Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme родился в 1212 г. в местности бирлинь, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg было 11209 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Groitzsch, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix von Böhmen в 1243 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 октября 1267 г. в местности брэнденбург ан дир хавел, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности страусбирг, крис обирбарним, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme nació en 1212, en Berlin, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Markgraf Albrecht II. von Brandenburg, tenía 11209 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Groitzsch, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Beatrix von Böhmen en 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1267, en Brandenburg an der Havel, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Strausberg, Kreis Oberbarnim, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania.
